svg.title: Complete Azure AI Pipeline Flow
svg.desc: End-to-end flow from file upload through Azure Blob, ADF, parsing, GPT-4o normalization, OneLake storage, Spark cleaning, AI enrichment, pattern discovery, to insight generation and delivery via Power BI

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Step 1: Azure Blob Storage file upload trigger')
g.text: Azure Blob Storage receives any file format

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Step 2: Azure Data Factory pipeline trigger')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Step 3: format detection and routing')
g.text: Azure Content Understanding checks MIME type

svg.text: Parser chosen based on file type

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the CSV parser work?')
sendPrompt('How does Document Intelligence parse PDFs?')
sendPrompt('How does the audio parser work?')
sendPrompt('How does the email and text parser work?')

svg.text: all output: raw text + raw rows

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Step 4: GPT-4o universal normalization to canonical JSON')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Step 5: storing canonical JSON in Microsoft Fabric OneLake Delta table')
g.text: Fabric Delta table — ACID, time travel

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Step 6: LLM execution planning — how GPT-4o decides what to clean and enrich')
g.text: GPT-4o reads digest → execution plan JSON

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Step 7: Fabric Spark data cleaning on full dataset')
g.text: Fix nulls, type errors, format issues

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Step 8: AI enrichment using Azure AI Language — sentiment, category, urgency')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Step 9: cross-dataset pattern discovery using Fabric Spark and Azure AI Foundry')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Step 10: GPT-4o generating plain-English insight cards from enriched data')
sendPrompt('How does Fabric Data Agent allow natural language querying of the pipeline data?')
sendPrompt('How does Power BI connect to OneLake for live dashboards?')
sendPrompt('What is the final business outcome of this pipeline?')

svg.text: $0.019 per file · LLM reads digests only · Spark processes full rows
Click any step to go deeper →
